variant_decisions.reason: fixed peak SSH, fixed speed-based radius and equal positive mass cannot all hold for distinct Gaussian and compact quadratic profiles
the validated compensated primitive lacks an evidence-supported mapping from SSH amplitude to vertical density structure
one regional buoyancy-frequency scalar does not determine a continuous density profile and boundary-conditioned vertical eigenfunction
the evidence ledger contains no transfer coefficient from the internal mode to free-surface height
reported propagated energy maps analytically to the registered Gaussian crest-trough packet under an explicit linear long-wave energy convention
regional volume medians and event velocity ranges do not supply a jointly supported amplitude-duration scenario
displaced volume and acceleration do not determine a wave without an event-specific generation/entrainment transfer model

acceptance: pass only when every preregistered pending E006 structural variant is implemented or explicitly excluded with a non-external scientific reason
